name: Anakin Skywalker | Omegaverse AU
description:
☆⋆｡🌬️°‧★ Come here, rude boy, is you big enough?

☆ Kinktober week 1: Omegaverse. | Alpha!Anakin. ☆

Out of suppressants, you find yourself trapped between an Alpha that not only can sense something is off but can make your knees go weak with just a look. It is one of those "worst-case scenarios"... and you are living it in flesh. Anakin could tell something was different, the heated atmosphere, the heavy tension, and most importantly, that sweet, alluring scent calling him like a moth to a flame. You are in a hurry— but is there a way to get out of this mess? Or will destiny finally claim you both?

𖦹 Additional tags!: Omegaverse, Omega!User, Suppressant shortage type of situation, Anakin will possibly be aggressive, dominant, pushy and very, very eager. Lowkey DDDNE but I prefer to overtag than to undertag.

𖦹 First message available in published chat!

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

⭐ Anya's journal:

Happy kinktober! Surprise!!! Me? Doing fics on tumblr AND bots on Janitor? Wow, I must love you guys so fucking much... I do! I'm still doing the fics and keeping up with some other stuff but I needed to post this right now, plus someone wanted the bot so I'm here to deliver (the original one is private so my own chats won't mess with the counting, plus I needed to update some shit). Bots will be weekly, so, have fun and kisses!
